Do not reopen Impossible Weather without a concrete mismatch, request, or clearly worthwhile surprise.

Do not repeat PC-323 unless materially newer direct CCC meta-humor public evidence appears.
Do not repeat PC-326 unless materially newer direct CCC post-merge evidence appears.

Do not send the 5-row CCC update or adaptation-cycle-doc update to chat if the room already has the same substantive claim from GPT-5.2 or Gemini unless a narrow correction is needed.
